---
title: "Selected talks and presentations"
---

Here is a selection of slides I used in some of my conference talks or invited lectures. If you attended my talk and missed a reference to a paper or a figure, you can track them down here.

**If you want to download any slides, use the download button in the top-right corner on the GitHub page where each of the "PDF" links below takes you.**

### 2023

#### **Charting ancient past through modern genomics**

"*ISBA 2023*, Tartu, Estonia

-   [slides](https://github.com/bodkan/bodkan.github.io/main/talks/2023-09-15%20ISBA.pdf) (PDF download)

### 2022

#### **New stories of old DNA**

"*Biological Thursdays*" seminar series, Charles University in Prague, Czech Republic

-   [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B2jrgnjNqC0) (talk, **in Czech**)
-   [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7fCkHfcCDtc) (discussion, **in Czech**)

#### ***slendr*****: a framework for simulation and analysis of spatio-temporal population genomic data**

"*Palaeo and Population genetics series*", Uppsala, Sweden (**online webinar**)

-   [slides](https://github.com/bodkan/bodkan.github.io/main/talks/2022-09-23%20Uppsala%20seminar.pdf) (PDF)

### 2019

#### **Neanderthal ancestry in modern human genomes**

*"Systems Biology Workshop"*, La Trobe University, Melbourne, Australia

-   [slides](https://github.com/bodkan/bodkan.github.io/tree/main/talks/2019-05-15%20Melbourne%20workshop.pdf) (PDF)

## Conference presentations

### 2019

#### **Limits of long-term selection against Neanderthal introgression**

*"*Reconstructing the human past: using ancient and modern genomics*"*, Heidelberg, Germany

-   [slides](https://github.com/bodkan/bodkan.github.io/tree/main/talks/2019-04-01%20Heidelberg%20EMBO.pdf) (PDF)

#### **The evolutionary history of Denisovan and Neanderthal Y chromosomes**

*"6th International Anthropological Congress of Dr. Ales Hrdlicka"*, Humpolec, Czech Republic

-   [slides](https://github.com/bodkan/bodkan.github.io/tree/main/talks/2019-09-04%20Humpolec%20Y%20chromosomes.pdf) (PDF)

#### **Limits of long-term selection against Neanderthal introgression**

*"6th International Anthropological Congress of Dr. Ales Hrdlicka"*, Humpolec, Czech Republic

-   [slides](https://github.com/bodkan/bodkan.github.io/tree/main/talks/2019-09-04%20Humpolec%20PNAS.pdf) (PDF)

## Interviews and podcasts

### 2020

#### podcast interview

-   [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bq1RI3AbIso)
